marketTrends.description: 67% of retail/travel enterprises expected to complete cloud ERP migration by 2027
Organizations consolidating from average of 4.2 data warehouses to 1-2 unified platforms
Leading organizations deploying ML-based data validation achieving 85% error reduction
56% of enterprises adopting multi-cloud data platforms (AWS, Azure, SAP BTP)

competitiveLandscape.context: Market leaders investing $2-5M annually in data modernization
competitiveLandscape.laggardRisk: Companies delaying modernization experiencing 15-25% margin erosion
competitiveLandscape.leaderAdvantage: Early adopters achieving 2-3x faster decision cycles

successFactors: Executive sponsorship from CFO or COO level
Phased rollout with early wins (60-90 days)
Integration with existing ERP migration plans
Clear KPIs: error rate, processing time, cost per order
Change management and user adoption focus
riskFactors: Underestimating data cleanup effort (adds 20-30% to timeline)
